lanes.name: The Brain Gets Bigger
lanes.narrative: Start by running the full 12M-word ingestion, then surface the library as a browsable reference students can explore — and keep it current as Travis keeps teaching.

lanes.name: More Plays in the Playbook
lanes.narrative: One workflow at launch becomes a full library of Travis's best plays — every major framework becomes something students can walk through and execute, not just read about.

lanes.name: The Live War Room
lanes.narrative: MRA becomes the tab students keep open all day — a command center for every active prospect, with AI that reads incoming replies and drafts the next move.

lanes.name: Operational Maturity
lanes.narrative: The backend catches up to the product — offerings that convert at the right moment, curriculum intelligence that closes the feedback loop, and a coaching layer that scales Travis's team without adding headcount.

lanes.name: MRA Everywhere
lanes.narrative: The concept library isn't just an app — it's a platform. Spin-off tools, community bots, and a public API let Travis's brain show up anywhere he teaches.
